name: NSTS Bancorp, Inc.
business: NSTS Bancorp, Inc. operates as a savings and loan holding company, with its subsidiary North Shore Trust and Savings providing traditional banking services, primarily originating one- to four-family residential mortgage loans and attracting deposits from the general public in Lake County, Illinois and adjacent communities.
sellsTo: individuals and families in Lake County, Illinois and adjacent communities
customers needing residential mortgage loans and deposit accounts

exposures.sentence: Our principal lending activity has been the origination of loans collateralized by one- to four-family residential real estate loans located in our market area.
